summary: Iteration 87: Verified three bug fixes - 1) Take Tour button works on both desktop and mobile (touchEnd handler added), 2) Star Chart zoom buttons (+/-) visible and functional on desktop and mobile, pinch-to-zoom implemented in code, 3) Star Chart cultural constellation stories working - Mayan Sky selection shows Mayan constellations with cultural mythology panel showing Ak Ek (Turtle), Zinaan Ek, Balam, Chan, Xul Ek tabs with stories and Listen to Story TTS button. Journey button correctly shows 'Mayan Sky Journey' when Mayan culture is active.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Three bugs were fixed and verified: 1) Take Tour button on landing page now has touchEnd handler for reliable mobile taps - opens GuidedTour overlay with card walkthrough and swipe navigation. 2) Star Chart has zoom +/- buttons (data-testid zoom-in-btn, zoom-out-btn) positioned at bottom-right, plus pinch-to-zoom implemented via touchmove with 2-finger detection. 3) Star Chart cultural constellation stories work - select a culture from World Skies picker, cultural constellations appear as green overlays, clicking opens cultural story panel with mythology tabs. Journey mode uses cultural constellations when a culture is active.

take_tour_button.mobile: WORKING - touchEnd handler ensures reliable tap response
take_tour_button.swipe_navigation: WORKING - left/right swipe navigates tour steps

star_chart_zoom.zoom_buttons: WORKING - Plus/Minus buttons at bottom-right (data-testid zoom-in-btn, zoom-out-btn)
star_chart_zoom.pinch_to_zoom: IMPLEMENTED - touchmove with 2-finger detection adjusts spherical.radius
star_chart_zoom.scroll_zoom: WORKING - mouse wheel zooms on desktop

cultural_constellation_stories.culture_picker: WORKING - World Skies toggle opens picker with 20+ cultures

mayan_sky.story_panel: WORKING - shows mythology, figure, story, cosmic lesson, Listen to Story TTS

cultural_constellation_stories.journey_mode: WORKING - shows 'Mayan Sky Journey' when Mayan culture active, narrates cultural constellations
cultural_constellation_stories.3d_click: WORKING - cultural sprites have userData.culturalConst, raycaster checks cultural sprites first

bugs_fixed.bug: Take Tour button doesn't work reliably on mobile
bugs_fixed.fix: Added onTouchEnd handler to button in Landing.js (line 866)

bugs_fixed.bug: Star chart can't zoom on mobile (no pinch-to-zoom)
bugs_fixed.fix: Added pinch-to-zoom via touchmove with 2-finger detection in StarChart.js (lines 769-796), plus zoom +/- buttons

bugs_fixed.bug: Star chart constellation stories stuck on Western/Aries
bugs_fixed.fix: Cultural constellation click handler checks cultural sprites FIRST before Western zodiac (StarChart.js lines 813-829), cultural story panel shows selected culture's stories
